category_sources: Official project page at https://www.semicomplete.com/projects/fex/ says Fex tokenizes strings and extracts fields.
source_facts.description says it is a field extraction tool.
display_name_sources: Official project page at https://www.semicomplete.com/projects/fex/ uses the name fex.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository is linked from the project page for downloads.
Official project page at https://www.semicomplete.com/projects/fex/ provides usage, command-line arguments, and examples.
repo_sources: Official project page at https://www.semicomplete.com/projects/fex/ links releases on https://github.com/jordansissel/fex.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official project page download link.
tags_sources: Official project page documents token-field extraction and examples for parsing Apache logs, paths, and delimited text.
